description:
『BLOKES on BLOCKS!』 is a fast-paced action party game for up to 6 players that anyone can jump into with simple controls!
Choose your favorite bloke and knock the other blokes flying!

【Game Features】
▼ Simple Controls
Movement is all you need—up, down, left, and right.
Crash into other players to knock them down,
then crash into them again to send them flying.
It’s a simple, straight-up competitive game built entirely around moving and crashing into your opponents.

▼ Chaotic Multiplayer Fun
Pick up items to crank up the chaos in battle—press the A button to use them!
Bombs, missiles, beams, and more send matches into total mayhem.
Fast, chaotic matches make it easy to jump in anytime—even if you only have a few minutes to play.

【Game Modes】
▼ Last Stand
Survive to the very end!
A life-based battle mode where you respawn quickly, even after getting knocked out.
Lose all your lives, and you can still attack from outside to mess with the action.
a loud, chaotic mode that stays exciting until the very last moment.

▼ Chip Rush
Collect chips and claim victory!
Gather chips scattered across the stage or steal them from other players to compete for the win.
Near the end of the match, the Piggy Bank appears, opening up a huge chance for a last-second comeback!

▼ Sudden Smash
Get knocked down, and it’s instant KO!?
A high-risk, round-based battle where every smash is a one-hit finisher.
Send your opponents flying, rack up points, and aim for first place!
